name: LinkedIn: Feed Digest
summary: Scroll the logged-in LinkedIn home feed read-only and return up to max_posts recent posts with author, body text, and reaction/comment/repost counts.
description: Open the logged-in LinkedIn home feed (/feed/) in the existing session, scroll to load posts, and return a flat array of recent feed posts. Each item carries the author name, author profile/company URL, the post body text, and visible reaction/comment/repost counts. Read-only: never likes, comments, reposts, or connects. Use linkedin_open to expand a single post with its comments.

max_posts.description: Maximum number of feed posts to return. Defaults to 20. Hard cap 50 (the feed is virtualized and the scroll is bounded).

steps.name: Open the LinkedIn home feed in the existing session
Wait for the main feed wrapper

inputs.target_selector: button[aria-label^="Open control menu for post by "]

steps.name: Scroll until roughly max_posts posts are loaded

help.summary: Scroll the logged-in LinkedIn home feed read-only and return up to max_posts recent posts.

parameters.max_posts: Maximum number of feed posts to return. Default 20, max 50.

examples.description: Return up to 20 recent posts from your LinkedIn home feed.
Return up to 40 recent feed posts.

returns: Array of feed posts: { author, author_url, text, reactions, comments, reposts } (counts are strings, default "0").
notes: Read-only. Never likes, comments, reposts, or connects.
Requires an existing logged-in LinkedIn session.
The feed is virtualized; very large max_posts values may return fewer items than requested.
Use linkedin_open to expand a single post with its comment thread.
